cloud.case_domain: all 48 exact case IDs in the bound protocol sample

local_mac.role: independent reconstruction, replay, aggregation, synchronization, and publication only

exclusivity_rule: No host other than cloud may solve a protocol case. The Mac begins independent replay only from immutable pushed result receipts and never edits cloud result directories.
stop_conditions: artifact projection materially exceeds the predeclared bounded sample
claim_limit: Resource and case-ownership receipt only; no mathematical closure.
